'''gazhuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enation|enation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enation|enation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gazhuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzhirith|gæzhirith]] || [[word:gæzhirij|gæzhirij]] || [[word:gæzhirish|gæzhirish]] || [[word:gæzhiri|gæzhiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhuzhuruth|gazhuzhuruth]] || [[word:gazhuzhuruj|gazhuzhuruj]] || [[word:gazhuzhurush|gazhuzhurush]] || [[word:gazhuzhuru|gazhuzhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhuruth|gazhuruth]] || [[word:gazhuruj|gazhuruj]] || [[word:gazhurush|gazhurush]] || [[word:gazhuru|gazhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhufrufth|gazhufrufth]] || [[word:gazhufrufj|gazhufrufj]] || [[word:gazhufrufsh|gazhufrufsh]] || [[word:gazhufruf|gazhufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhuruthu|gazhuruthu]] || [[word:gazhuruju|gazhuruju]] || [[word:gazhurushu|gazhurushu]] || [[word:gazhuruku|gazhuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhuruth|gazhuruth]] || [[word:gazhuruj|gazhuruj]] || [[word:gazhurush|gazhurush]] || [[word:gazhuru|gazhuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhuruthul|gazhuruthul]] || [[word:gazhurujul|gazhurujul]] || [[word:gazhurushul|gazhurushul]] || [[word:gazhurukul|gazhurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhuruuthuthu|gazhuruuthuthu]] || [[word:gazhuruujuju|gazhuruujuju]] || [[word:gazhuruushushu|gazhuruushushu]] || [[word:gazhuruuku|gazhuruuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhuruthun|gazhuruthun]] || [[word:gazhurujun|gazhurujun]] || [[word:gazhurushun|gazhurushun]] || [[word:gazhurukun|gazhurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhuruthuoro|gazhuruthuoro]] || [[word:gazhurujuoro|gazhurujuoro]] || [[word:gazhurushuoro|gazhurushuoro]] || [[word:gazhurukuoro|gazhurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]

{{wordpage|307a66b}}
